ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* User's birthdate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* User's gender */,
  "user_type" INTEGER /* User type (e.g., OWNER, COMPANION) */,
  "primary_contact" TEXT /* Primary contact number */,
  "alternate_contact" TEXT /* Alternate contact number */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's primary email address */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's profile picture */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "address_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the user's address */,
  "address_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the user's address */,
  "landmark" TEXT /* Landmark near the user's address */,
  "town" TEXT /* Town where the user resides */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Name of the educational institution or professional network the user is associated with */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Neighborhood or community the user is part of */,
  "interests" TEXT /* List of user interests */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact number */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "verification_status" TEXT /* Verification status of the user's account */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "date_deactivated" TEXT /* Date when the user account was deactivated */,
  "created_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the account */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "date_voided" TEXT /* Date when the user account was voided */,
  "updated_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the account */,
  "void_reason" TEXT /* Reason for voiding the user account */,
  "voided" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is voided */,
  "voided_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who voided the account */,
  "uuid" TEXT /* Unique UUID for the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio or personal description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_active FOREIGN KEY ("active") REFERENCES user_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_type FOREIGN KEY ("user_type") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., OWNER, COMPANION) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., ACTIVE, DEACTIVATED, VOIDED) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "is_suspended" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is suspended */,
  "suspension_reason" TEXT /* Reason for suspension */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., CREATED, UPDATED, VOIDED) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the activity */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "activity_location" TEXT /* Location where the activity occurred */,
  "activity_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the contact */,
  "contact_type" TEXT /* Type of contact (e.g., EMAIL, SOCIAL_MEDIA) */,
  "contact_value" TEXT /* Value of the contact (e.g., email address, social media handle) */,
  "contact_status" TEXT /* Status of the contact (e.g., verified, unverified) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_contacts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the preference */,
  "preference_key" TEXT /* Key of the preference (e.g., RIDE_PREFERENCE, MUSIC_PREFERENCE) */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference (e.g., EARLY_MORNING, NO_MUSIC) */,
  "preference_group" TEXT /* Category of the preference (e.g., ride, profile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., home, work) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "landmark" TEXT /* Landmark near the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of the location (e.g., home, work, school) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_locations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the interaction */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., MESSAGE, RIDE_REQUEST) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the interaction */,
  "interaction_message" TEXT /* Message content of the interaction */,
  "interaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the interaction (e.g., read, unread) */,
  "interaction_location" TEXT /* Location where the interaction occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "reviewee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the reviewer (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text content of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the review */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  "review_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the review was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_reviewee_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ride_history" (
  "ride_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ride */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who offered the ride (owner) */,
  "companion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who joined the ride (companion) */,
  "ride_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the ride */,
  "start_location" TEXT /* Starting location of the ride */,
  "end_location" TEXT /* Ending location of the ride */,
  "ride_status" TEXT /* Status of the ride (e.g., COMPLETED, CANCELLED) */,
  "ride_cost" REAL /* Cost of the ride */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  "driver_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the companion to the driver (1-5) */,
  "companion_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the driver to the companion (1-5) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ride_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ride_history_companion_id FOREIGN KEY ("companion_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ride_history_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
